header.title: Form Forge for ODK
header.subtitle: Forms are stored in this browser only — nothing leaves your device.

empty.title: No forms yet
empty.hint: Create a new form to get started.

newFormDialog.createHint: Enter a form title to enable Create — picking a starting point above suggests one.
newFormDialog.loadFailed: The template could not be loaded.

householdSurvey.title: Household survey
householdSurvey.description: Roster-based household questionnaire: demographics, dwelling and water access, with a repeat for household members. Bilingual English/French.

individualRegistration.title: Individual registration
individualRegistration.description: Register one person per submission: identity, demographics, contact details and consent. Bilingual English/French.

siteMonitoringVisit.title: Site monitoring visit
siteMonitoringVisit.description: Field-visit checklist with GPS location, observations and conditional follow-up questions. Bilingual English/French.

feedbackSatisfaction.title: Feedback & satisfaction
feedbackSatisfaction.description: Short anonymous feedback questionnaire with satisfaction scales and open comments. Bilingual English/French.

saveTemplateDialog.name: Template name
saveTemplateDialog.note: Templates are stored in this browser. Attachments are not included.

deleteConfirm.message: Delete "{title}" and its attachments? This cannot be undone.

footer.storageHint: Storage may be cleared under pressure —
